title: athyrium umbrosum var. muricatum
intro: Athyrium umbrosum var. muricatum, also known as the spotted lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Athyrium genus, native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium umbrosum var. muricatum include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to improve circulation and immune function. Athyrium umbrosum var. muricatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
